label: Preservation Time Calculator
description: Node config for the Preservation Time Calculator in the Planning Graph, helping SSA decide how long different foods can be safely stored under various preservation methods.

outputs.description: Outputs include recommended processing and storage times plus risk bands and a ready-to-run preservation session template for the SessionRunner.

steps.title: Confirm preservation details
steps.desc: Review the food type, method, container, and conditions the SSA used to calculate your preservation time. Adjust any details that don’t match what you’re actually doing.

metadata.cueNotes: This is a planning/safety review step only; no live processing yet.

steps.title: Apply recommended processing time
steps.desc: Follow the recommended processing time for your method (e.g., pressure canning, water bath, dehydrating). Make sure all equipment is ready and calibrated before you begin.

metadata.cueNotes: Use this with a full preservation session that includes temperature and venting guidance.

steps.title: Label and store with confidence
steps.desc: Label each container with contents, date, method, and recommended ‘use by’ window based on the calculated storage time.

metadata.cueNotes: This step supports storehouse organization and future meal planning.

logic.description: Shim and schema wiring for the Preservation Time Calculator; shim runs calculations and can emit a preservation-oriented session into the SessionRunner.

hooks.description: React hooks that connect preservation-time results into storehouse, batch cooking, and inventory planning flows.

next.description: Next-step mappings to move from preservation-time insights into batch sessions, storehouse labeling sessions, and garden/animal planning where relevant.
